name: Sovereign Container Infrastructure (Podman/Headscale)
summary: Implementation of sovereign, daemonless container orchestration using Podman and Headscale to bridge local GPU resources with public frontends.

best_practices.reasoning: Podman is daemonless and rootless, significantly improving security by running containers as normal user processes.
Use Podman Compose as a drop-in replacement for Docker Compose for local development mirroring production without the Docker daemon overhead.
Headscale serves as a private, self-hosted coordination server (Sovereign alternative to Tailscale) to mask backend IPs while maintaining connectivity to Netlify.

lint_analysis.podman: Direct drop-in replacement for Docker. Daemonless/Rootless architecture.
lint_analysis.buildah: Fine-grained control over OCI images, build without Dockerfile.
lint_analysis.rancher_desktop: Local Kubernetes cluster management with GUI.
lint_analysis.containerd: High-performance production runtime, default for K8s.

implementation_instruction: Use 'podman compose up -d' for all SkyEye infrastructure components to ensure sovereign isolation.
